expectations.text: Has subject line and preview text
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Your invitation is looking great — imagine what a little extra sparkle could do'. Preview text: 'You're so close to something stunning. See what premium can add.'

expectations.text: Shows premium benefits without shaming the free template choice
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'it's already shaping up beautifully'. Closes with 'Your free template is yours to keep and publish anytime — no pressure at all.' No guilt-tripping.

expectations.text: Mentions specific premium features (animations, RSVP, photo gallery, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Lists all 5 features with benefit-oriented descriptions: animated elements, custom fonts, RSVP tracking, photo galleries, matching thank-you cards.

expectations.text: Has a clear CTA to upgrade or preview premium templates
expectations.evidence: CTA: '[See Premium Templates →]'. Also P.S. mentions customizations carry over.

expectations.text: Tone is encouraging and aspirational, not guilt-tripping
expectations.evidence: Encouraging throughout: 'We just wanted to let you know there's even more you can do with it, if you're interested.' Very respectful.
Only one version provided. No alternative approaches or A/B testing suggestions.
